meaning: n.作表的人,制表机,(打字机上为制表用的)跳格键
examples: Introduction is made to the properties, working principles and practical effects of the tabulator bars of the Johnson Corporatin (Wuxi) Technology Co.
No sooner was IBM out of hot water with the Justice Dept. over its tabulator business then it was right back in the frying pan.
In the 1940s the government began an investigation of the business tabulator market, which was then split formally between IBM (electrical tabulators) and Remington Rand (mechanical tabulators).
